prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body character design, centered, pure white background, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors, no text / no symbols / no garbled characters / no words, a teenage Japanese girl, ordinary appearance, average looks, plain facial features, soft round face, gentle and slightly melancholic expression, light brown eyes with a reflective, watery quality, straight medium-length brown hair with subtle highlights, simple hairstyle, hair falling naturally to shoulders with a few loose strands framing the face, fair skin, slender but average build, wearing a standard NERV plug suit, form-fitting dark purple bodysuit with green accents and hexagonal patterns on the torso and limbs, suit has a sleek synthetic material texture, green collar and cuffs, a small NERV emblem on the chest, the character stands in a neutral pose, emanating a sense of quiet determination mixed with underlying vulnerability, subtle glow of AT Field as a faint, shimmering aura around the body, aesthetic is elegant and细腻, capturing the唯美 and melancholic tone of the world, the overall impression is of an ordinary girl thrust into extraordinary circumstances, her demeanor reflecting the压力 and初期的恐惧 of chapter 1., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
